title: Water Logging – A Forgotten Problem in Pigeonpea
abstract:
The Problem
• Water-logging is emerging as a pressing concern at the backdrop of climate change in recent years
• A global report on climate change has projected 0.5-1.20C rise in temperatures by 2020, resulting in unpredictable and excessive rains
• Globally, more than 40 m ha area is estimated to be affected by water-logging
• In India about 8.53 m ha area is affected by water-logging with an estimated crop loss of >2 m tons each year
